summaryAm: አንዲት ልዕልት ረጅም እረፍት ከወሰደች በኋላ በጓደኞች እና በቤተሰብ ደስታ የምትነቃበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: በጸጥታ መጠበቅ እና ተስፋን መያዝ አዲስ ጠዋትን ያመጣል።

source.name: Public-domain classic
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: በቆንጆ ቤተመንግሥት ውስጥ ደግ ልዕልት ትኖር ነበር። የወርቅ አክሊሏ እና አበቦቹ ቤቱ በፍቅር እንደተሞላ ያሳዩ ነበር።
pages.textEn: A kind princess lived in a beautiful castle where a golden crown and flowers showed she was loved.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of a beautiful castle garden with a golden crown on a bench and flowers showing the princess is loved.

pages.textAm: በበዓል ቀን ጠረጴዛው በአበቦች፣ በመብራቶች እና በትንንሽ ስጦታዎች ተሞላ። ሁሉም መልካም ምኞት አመጡላት።
pages.textEn: At a celebration, the table filled with flowers, lanterns, gifts, and kind wishes.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of a castle celebration table filled with flowers, lanterns, gifts, and kind wishes.

pages.textAm: በቤተመንግሥቱ መንገዶች አበቦች በቀስታ በቀሉ። ልዕልቷም እያደገች ለአበቦች እና ለደግ ቃላት ፍቅር አሳየች።
pages.textEn: Flowers grew along the castle halls as the princess grew to love flowers and kind words.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of flowered castle halls at night, showing the princess growing to love flowers and kind words.

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን ቤተመንግሥቱ በአበቦች መካከል ጸጥ አለ። ልዕልቷ በጣም ደክማ ረጅም እረፍት እንደሚያስፈልጋት ሁሉም ተረዱ።
pages.textEn: One day, the flowered castle grew quiet because the princess needed a long rest.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of a quiet flower-covered castle, suggesting the princess needs a long gentle rest.

pages.textAm: በጸጥ ያለ ክፍል አጠገብ የውሃ ቆርቆሮዎች እና አበቦች ተዘጋጁ። ቤተመንግሥቱም ድምፁን አሳነሰ፣ ሁሉም በተስፋ ጠበቀ።
pages.textEn: Near the quiet room, watering cans and flowers waited while the castle grew soft with hope.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of watering cans and flowers waiting near a quiet castle room while everyone keeps hope.

pages.textAm: ከመስኮቷ ውጭ አበቦች በቀስታ በቀሉ። ወፎች በላይ ሲበሩ፣ ጓደኞቿ በየቀኑ ውሃ አጠጡአቸው።
pages.textEn: Outside her window, flowers grew gently while friends watered them each day.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Friends watering flowers outside the princess's castle window.

pages.textAm: ወቅቶች ተቀያየሩ። በመስኮቱ ዙሪያ አበቦች በቀለም ተለዋወጡ፣ ተስፋም እንደ ቅጠል በቀስታ ቀጠለ።
pages.textEn: Seasons changed around the window, and hope stayed alive like leaves on the vines.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Castle flowers through changing seasons, gentle hopeful mood.

pages.textAm: አንድ ብሩህ ጠዋት ወፎች በመስኮቷ አጠገብ ዘመሩ። ልዕልቷ ዓይኖቿን በቀስታ ከፈተች።
pages.textEn: One bright morning, birds sang and the princess woke gently.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Birds singing near the castle window as the princess wakes gently.

pages.textAm: ቤተሰቧ እና ጓደኞቿ በደስታ ተቀበሏት። ማንም አልቸኮለም፤ ሁሉም በቀስታ እንድትመለስ ረዳት።
pages.textEn: Her family and friends welcomed her gently and joyfully.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Family and friends warmly welcoming the princess as she wakes.

pages.textAm: በአትክልቱ ውስጥ ትንሽ የእንኳን ደህና መጣሽ በዓል አደረጉ። ልዕልቷ በቀስታ ፈገግ አለች፣ ሁሉም ግን እንዳትደክም በርጋታ ነበሩ።
pages.textEn: They held a gentle welcome celebration in the garden.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle garden celebration for the princess with family and flowers.

pages.textAm: በየቀኑ ትንሽ ትንሽ ጥንካሬዋ ተመለሰ። አንድ ቀን አበባ አጠጣች፣ ሌላ ቀን ለልጆች በለስላሳ ድምፅ ታሪክ ነገረች።
pages.textEn: Each day she grew stronger and returned to small kind routines.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The princess watering flowers and telling a gentle story to children in a sunny garden.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቤተመንግሥቱ ትንሽ በዓል አደረገ። ሁሉም ተስፋ፣ ትዕግሥት እና በቀስታ መንከባከብ አዲስ ጠዋትን እንደሚያመጡ አስታወሱ።
pages.textEn: The castle celebrated hope, patience, and gentle care.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle castle garden celebration with the princess, family, friends, and flowers.
